# VisionBoard

> Free habit tracker, goal tracker, and productivity app designed to help you build routines and achieve your long-term visions.

## Overview
VisionBoard is a comprehensive personal growth platform. Unlike fragmented tools, VisionBoard combines a daily habit tracker, goal setting features, a visual vision board, and a daily planner into a single, cohesive interface.

## Key Features
- **Daily Habit Tracker**: Build habits with a visual streak tracker.
- **Goal Tracker**: Break massive goals into actionable daily tasks.
- **Vision Board**: Stay motivated with a digital visualization of your ideal future.
- **Journal & Notes**: Reflect on your daily progress.

## Important URLs
- **App URL**: https://my-vision-board-app.vercel.app/
- **Features**: https://my-vision-board-app.vercel.app/features
- **How It Works**: https://my-vision-board-app.vercel.app/how-it-works
- **About Us**: https://my-vision-board-app.vercel.app/about
- **Blog**: https://my-vision-board-app.vercel.app/blog
- **Contact**: https://my-vision-board-app.vercel.app/contact

## Knowledge & Support
For support, visit the Contact page. VisionBoard is entirely free to use with no hidden paywalls.
